query_normalized: llmxive follow-up: extending "joyai-vl-interaction: real-time vision-language interaction intelligen" computer science
rationale: This paper satisfies criteria (d) and (f) as a foundational survey and canonical reference for the domain of Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs), which is the specific technical context of the user's "JoyAI-VL-Interaction" follow-up. While it does not address the specific "JoyAI" system, it provides the essential background on architectures, training strategies, and interaction techniques (like M-CoT and LAVR) that any literature review on extending vision-language interaction would require
